name: htmx-frontend
description: HTMX JavaScript frontend with CI/CD pipeline

scripts.lint: eslint . --ext .js && prettier --check . && htmlhint *.html html/*.html html/blog/*.html html/templates/*.html && stylelint css/*.css
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --fix . --ext .js && prettier --write . && htmlhint --config .htmlhintrc *.html html/*.html html/blog/*.html html/templates/*.html
scripts.build: echo 'Build verification complete - Static site ready for deployment'
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run build

author: Jonathan Miroshnik
